profile.journeyText: My foundation in technology began with a Diploma and has rapidly evolved into my 2nd-year HND in Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence at NIBM. I thrive on solving complex computational problems, from untangling advanced mathematics to architecting robust software solutions. Whether I am developing native Android applications, integrating hardware with Arduino, or engineering web platforms, my focus is always on building applications that prioritize performance and user experience.
profile.devFocus:
I am a second-year Higher National Diploma student in Computer Science, actively developing my skills in software and system development. In my first year, I built projects and completed coursework in Java programming, MySQL database design, and HTML web development.

Currently, I am exploring Machine Learning, Robotics, and IoT, creating small hands-on projects to apply my learning in real-world scenarios. My focus is on building intelligent systems, automation solutions, and connected device applications while continuously improving my coding and development expertise.

projects.title: Moviestream
projects.description: A premium movie database and streaming platform built from the ground up to provide a 100% ad-free cinematic experience for users.

projects.title: Moviestream (Mobile App)
projects.description: Android streaming application built with performance optimization, clean UI, and custom backend integration.
